actionable_predicate: BG 2.62 provides a testable predicate for engineering-pathology: When the PM observes that a senior engineer keeps re-litigating a rejected design proposal in 1:1s, in design reviews, in Slack — apply this verse. The dhyāna stage is engaging; intervene with a direct conversation before the saṅga has hardened. Practical action: ask the engineer to write a postmortem on the decision (turning the brooding into structured analysis) before the cascade proceeds.
